description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rocker/verse:3.6.0 Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get -y install default-jdk curl netcdf-bin libnetcdf-dev libxml2-dev libssl-dev, creates a public directory, copies _images and custom.css into public, creates the packrat library directory at /builds/stanstrup-teaching/XCMS-course/packrat/lib/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu/3.6.0, installs BiocManager via R, installs the packrat package into that library via BiocManager, and restores the packrat environment. Add a deploy stage with a pages job that executes R -e 'source("build.R")', publishes the public/ folder as a Pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
